title: Tile Categories
subtitle: Manage your product categories
no_products_yet: No products in this category yet

empty_state.title: No categories yet
empty_state.description: Start by adding your first tile category

delete_category_warning_products: Removing this category will deactivate all your products in it. If no other dealer still has stock here, the category will be hidden for everyone.
delete_category_warning_empty: This will remove the category from inventory if it is not in use elsewhere.
reactivate_products_label: Also reactivate my inactive products in this category
reactivate_products_hint: Only applies when you are restoring a category that was previously removed. Turns your inactive SKUs in that category back on. Ignored when creating a brand-new category.
